column1: Yo what’s up my name’s Jason Pierce, I’m looking to book a Spring Break 26’ trip with my fraternity and got this number from a friend. We’re looking to go to Cancun — the Grand Oasis Cancun resort specifically. We would be coming down the week of March 9th-13th. We’d want to stay 5 nights and I should easily be able to get 15-20 people to sign up. What kind of group rates could we get for that trip? Let me know!
Hey Jason, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
Happy to help, Cancun is lit for sure gonna be a good time. Which school you all from?
University of South Carolina, go Cocks 🐓🤙
What kind of group rate could you offer for a group that size?
Also I know my friend got a complimentary booze cruise when signing up. Would that be the same for my group?

Yea the booze cruise deal is typically for getting started by a certain date. We're def way past there but I'll see what I can do to get that option added in if you're lookin to get rollin fairly soon
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Within the next few days for sure. I know the complementary booze cruise would be a very convincing factor for the guys too
So if you could work that in that would be massively appreciated
word will do the best I can brotha. we're a little late in the game
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Also how do I find out the exact group rate for the grand oasis Cancun resort specifically?

Yeah I got it, and when I want to move forward with booking I I just let you know? I'll send out all the info right now. I see you got the booze cruise on there if we pay by 1/21 -- that's huge appreciate it

Okay dope. And yea just click on either the 4 night or the 5 night quote links. That'll take you to a page that has the Grand Oasis package. When you click on that you'll see the different price breakdowns per person, based on how many ppl in a room
You'll see a 4 person price, per person, which is the cheapest. And then there's 3,2,1
The payment plan dates on the link, you can disregard. The actual payment plan will be what you see in the email body. These are sample quotes so you can see pricing
From here do I need your help with anything else? If not I can take it from here
So yea once we're ready I'll set up your actual reservation with your group size and your info on it as the group leader
I can set that up tomorrow if that works
Or tonight, depends when you're ready for it
Liked “The payment plan dates on the link, you can disregard. The actual payment plan will be what you see in the email body. These are sample quotes so you can see pricing”
Word yea I'll get it set up and send over in 10. Do we know if we want to do 4 nights, or 5?
Could we do the 9th-14th for dates too?
Yea I got you will send it over in a few
Liked “Yea I got you will send it over in a few”
how many slots do we want to start with? 16?
Alright I'm getting reserved in the room. I don't see the booze cruise on the reservation details. Can that get added?
Yea typically doesn't get added until you deposit before the deadline. But I can have it added in so you see jt
Yeah I see it now, thanks
Yo what's the deal with the party pass prices. I see it has the city, d'cave, and mandala beach club?
Yea so those are nightclubs that are off of the resort property. Those come with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at those venues
How much is it I can't find the price anywhere?
yea when youre logged in to your account, go to the "Buy Add-Ons" tab
hit the drop down and you'll see the diff options. 3 nights for $210, 4 nights $269, 5 nights $299
Yo the free booze cruise is for anyone who deposits before 1/21 right? The whole group doesn't have to pay by then right?
yea free booze cruise for those who deposit by tomorrow night
anyone after that we can still add in as long as we have the space. theyre also subject to prices increases if theres any
Reacted 🔥 to “anyone after that we can still add in as long as we have the space. theyre also subject to prices increases if theres any”
yooo J whats good fam! any word on the rest of the group we got 4 of you in here as of now

Yeah honestly I'm not too sure man people keep saying they're looking into it but r pressed for money rn. We're looking at 1-2 rooms at this point. Would the rates change at all if that's all we could fill?
Nah rates won't change, we'll just get rid of the open rooms. Only rate changes you may see is if rooms change in occupancy. Like a 3 person room vs a 4 person room.
Right now there's 4 of you, so you'll all be in one room for now
How many ppl do you think will end up rolling total?
lol oh damn. what happened to 15-20 lol
Shit happens😂 possibility of getting back up to 8
Trust me I thought 15-20 as well😭
Yeah people just procrastinating cuz of that February 3rd deadline. Is there any chance that gets extended?
lol all good gonna be a good time either way
wouldnt extending it just make them procrastinate more?
There r other plans floating around still so they're waiting on everything to come out abt every trip before deciding
word what other plans are out there?
Oh word. Miami aint lit like it use to be for spring break anymore. they gonna get out there and be kinda disappointed lol
they cracked down on a lot of stuff
Yeah fr that's what we're tryna say 😂
Cancun the best spot all around gotta get these guys on board asap
overall its the most guaranteed good time. Laudy y'all can go to literally any time lol
Yeah fs especially with that free booze cruise and all the clubs😂
whats good brooo how we lookin
Finalizing the people going we got a few late bookers. Hoping to get 2 rooms
Aight word. Had someone's mom call in the other day about cancelling actually. Cant remember who it was
yo Jason whats the good word my dog
We got enough people for 1 room as of now we're still trying to get another room of people to sign up but they won't make it before the deadline tonight
Word just lmk we'll see if we can get them added
yoyo whats the status brodie, did those other ppl want to be added
Got the 4th guy for the 1st room signing up now
so Rocco is not in your room?
Nah I think he's the one whose mom called
We got another guy signing up
Yeah the first room is about to be filed though by another guy
yo whats the word big dog
ops team is tryna get your room submitted. we need ou each to pay the final balance. was due Tuesday
also wtw with the guy filling your room
He's gonna book it after he's out of work today. Then we'll all pay the final balance
Should be finalized tn or tmrw.
lowkey bro hate to press but it def gotta be tonight so we dont jeopardize losing the room
Id hate to see it get cleared if we want to tomorrow
Do all 4 have to pay the full amount by tn?
yea bro. if they plan on going
Alright I'll see what I can do
We should be able to make that happen
The 4th dude in our room already has an account through the agency he wanted to get in contact with you w/ a couple questions. Do you wanna reach out to him at Paulodemoura163@gmail.com ?
Or do you have an email I can send him?
I'll hit him up though! you can also send him this # to text
The Paulo guy will prob pay last but he'll pay
Everybody paid lmk when u see it big dog
Reacted 🔥 to “yeassirr all locked in bro”
Say less big dog, free booze cruise too 🔥🔥

Yoooo what's goood big dawg, I got a super quick question for you bro. We're hearing a little something about a black band for the resort, wanted to know if you know anything about that? Is it worth and do yall do that? Let me know for sure big dawg 🤙

yerr whats good brodie. Yea so thats for the Grand Oasis Pyramid, its 25+ and tbh its not worth the price, it gives you access you a couple extra restaurants and stuff but imo its not worth the extra like $30 a day
Gotchu gotchu one of my boys was saying it possibly gets u access to some clubs is that cap or what bro man?
Also can u remind me what that party pass thing is?
uhh it may give you access to a late night bar, but pretty sure not a club. And yea bro the party pass comes with 3 events, you get express entry, cover charge, and open bar at the events
can choose between clubs downtown like mandala and la vaquita or a booze cruise, def recommend the booze cruise. For the 3 events i can hook it up with a bundle deal for $200
Wait so what's this? Can you choose 3 of any of these places?
How stiff is that $200 price for the party pass 😂
We're tryna go to the city, mandala beach club all day, then D'cave. What price could you get down to for that big Brodie man?
Yo you see my text big dawg?

Yoo my bad bro I knocked, but yea with the party package you can choose which club you wanna go to for that night, if you were to book it on your own it's like $230, but I can hook it up for $200, any lower I may get in trouble lmao
What if we wanted to go to mandala beach club day and get a table, then go to dcave and the city 2 nights. Could we do that through you for a good price?
No, 3 events total. Mandala beach day w/table, then dcave for a night, the city for a night
ohh mb i misread your text, but yea we can do those three, and I can hook it up with that $200 deal
did you want me to add it on for you guys?
Not yet, but if we did do that, the only other thing we'd have to pay for is the table at mandala beach club?
yea so you get open bar for just drinks, but tables/bottle service are on you
It would be lit if bottles were included tho lol
Yeah that's prob what we'll do. We gotta talk it all over then I'll lyk
hey whenever you have a min, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers

Yo boss man. With everything going on in Cancun, we had to switch our flight to a different one. The website won't let me change my flight information says you can't within 14 days of your trip. Can you help us work this out, we all changed our flights?
The confirmation code of our flights is the same we just switched the city we're flying out of
Yoyo! what's the new flight info?

Outbound Flight Confirmation Code: UI6PHT Frontier Airlines Flight 159 CLT -> CUN Departure time: 8:58 AM Arrival Time: 11:05 AM Return Flight Confirmation Code: UI6PHT Frontier Airlines Flight 158 CUN -> CLT Departure time: 3:43 PM Arrival Time: 7:48 PM The remaining 3 people in my group are on that same flight. Let me know if you need any more info to get the transportation adjusted. Thanks for the help super bro! 🤙
yoyo! just emailed everyone the info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any of the other party pass tickets? you all have the booze cruise locked in
Liked “yoyo! just emailed everyone the info on where to find our transportation service when you land”

Yeah we're thinking about it for sure, just have to figure out what the best options are. We're ideally tryna go to 3 clubs and possibly get a table at one of those clubs. Which of the spots do you fw the most? And which do u think would be best to have a table at?
D'Cave, Mandala, and HOF are pretty smooth bro both have good set ups for tables
Mandala the inside one? I'd wanna think the mandala beach club is more lit than that. Same kinda thing with HOF. R those small inside places rlly that lit?
its newly branded but use to be called The City
Alright yeah bet we'll have to take a closer look here soon. Definitely tryna work smthn out though
Do we have to decide on the 3 clubs when we pay, or can we decide on the clubs after?
you decide after on arrival. you'll have a 3 night pas and be able to choose which 3 nights
Is mandala day or night more lit usually?

Alright and then if we want a table we just have to book that before they sell out? Bet, so then we're definitely gonna do the 3 day party package. Idk when we can pay tho we're stretched pretty thin rn 😂🤣
lol lmk when you want me to add it in and I got you
Mandala Beach at night is top tier, Mandala nightclub at night is cool but smaller dancefloor, mostly sections. Mandala Beach during day is a vibe
Yo my boy, you can add the party package to our accounts 🤙🍾
And then if we wanted to look into getting a table when do we do that?
did you want to do all of the nights?
Wdym? We wanna do the 3-night party package
oh bet I aint see your prev text my b
How do we go abt getting that
that you'll do when you get on site. ask our staff how to go about getting that set up. usually they can pre do it or they'll have you do it soon as you get to the club
Liked “that you'll do when you get on site. ask our staff how to go about getting that set up. usually they can pre do it or they'll have you do it soon as you get to the club”
Yo spiffy, quick question. You think chicks r still going to Cancun with all the shit going on in Mexico? Just thought of that and I'm tweaking out. Lmk bro🤙
Lol bro its still gonna be lit. we haven't gotten that many cancellations
Gotchu bro Preesh for the reassurance
Reacted 🤙 to “Lol bro its still gonna be lit. we haven't gotten that many cancellations”
Yoooooo spifffff we made it bro shit lit 🤙🤙🤙
Glad yall made it out there fam
